Holocene alluvium, below hills of Pliocene and Pleistocene andesitic volcanic flows, sills, and plugs; Plio-Pleistocene Coso Formation (including undifferentiated sedimentary rock and rhyolitic pyroclastic rock); Plio-Pleistocene red arkosic arkosic sandstone; Mesozoic granite; Mesozoic intrusive rocks. Silt and sand soil, 10 YR 3/3 dark brown. Joshua tree woodland with Acamptopappus, Krascheninnikovia, Grayia, Lycium andersonii, Artemisia spinescens, Opuntia basilaris, etc.
locality: Little Cactus Flats c. 8.7 air miles SE of Olancha, c. 3.6 air miles east of North Haiwee Reservoir. Cactus Flats Road SE 750 to SE 756, 8.7 road miles SE of US Hwy 395. 0.1 road mile north of junction with SE762
